creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Neel Chauhan from comment #4)
> Created attachment 179321 [details]
> Patch to update security/tor-devel to 0.3.0.2-alpha (Update 1)
> 
> Here is an updated patch where I put it in the MAN option, and fixed other
> errors.

You should use standard MANPAGES option, you don't need DESC that way. Also, again, please use options helpers (MANPAGES_BUILD_DEPENDS, MANPAGES_CONFIGURE_OFF)
